§6Basic Lens§f:
The §6Basic Lens §f(advancedrocketry:lens) is a §6precise optical component §f used in §6lens blocks §f and §6precision instruments§f. It is a §6crafting component §f for the §6Lens Block §f and §6Vacuum-Chamber Laser Emitter§f.

§6Production Path§f:
- The §6Basic Lens §f is produced by §6grinding §f §bsilicon wafers §f in a §6Precision Assembler §f
- §eTip§f: check §6JEI §f for the §bcurrent §f recipe in your pack; the exact inputs are modpack-configured
- Yields §b1-3 §fBasic Lenses per crafting operation

§6Function§f:
- §bOptical component §f: required for §6Lens Block §f and §6Vacuum-Chamber Laser Emitter §f recipes
- §bStack size §f: 64
- §bNo direct tool/weapon use §f
- §bPrecision §f: §blow-tolerance §f optical component

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Basic Lens is a component of, but it is referenced in 14 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:

- §eTip§f: keep a §6stock of Basic Lenses §f in a §6chest §f next to your §6Precision Assembler §f
- §eTip§f: a §6Lens Block §f requires §b3 §fBasic Lenses — craft in bulk
- §cWarning§f: the §6Basic Lens §f is §cnot §f a §6vanilla Minecraft §f glass pane; it is a §bspecialized §fAR item
